issue_summary: Identity and pose are acceptable; chest pockets and scarf placement drifted.

issues.message: Chest pocket count and placement do not match the approved costume sheet.
issues.evidence: Two oversized chest pockets appear where the approved sheet has one flatter pocket shape per side.
issues.edit_instruction: Reduce the front chest pockets to the approved flatter medic-desert design and keep the rest unchanged.

issues.message: Scarf drape is slightly too bulky.
issues.evidence: The scarf rises too high at the neck compared with the approved sheet.
issues.edit_instruction: Slim the scarf drape slightly while keeping the same color and fabric.

edit_recommendation.edit_prompt: Keep the same character, angle, pose, and costume colors. Replace the oversized chest pockets with the approved flatter medic-desert pocket design and slim the scarf drape slightly. Do not change face, body, pose, or background.

notes: Good candidate for a targeted edit pass.
